Program_Description: The Sacramento County WIC program helps pregnant women, new moms, and young children eat well, stay healthy, and be active.
Target_Population: Pregnant women, new moms, and children under five years old.
Eligibility_Requirements: You are pregnant now or within the last six months and/or you have a child under the age of five years.
Application_Process: All services are by appointment only. Please call for details.
